subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Brisbane | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-9581
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in Brisbane. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-9581. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
